99 = Patient was unable to complete the interview
287 C0600_CNDCT_STF_MENTL_STUS_CD C0600_CNDCT_STF_MENTL_STUS_CD C0600 Staff to Conduct Brief Interview for Mental Status - The data in this column indicates whether or not a staff assessment for mental status should be performed.
